title: Crowdsec Live Threat Insights
description: Cyber threat insights with CrowdSec, Loki and Grafana

targets.expr: sum by (country, asname, asnumber, ip) (count_over_time({job="crowdsec", instance=~"${host:raw}"} | country != "" | keep country, asname, asnumber, ip [30d]))
sort_desc(topk(10, sum by (country) (count_over_time({job="crowdsec", instance=~"${host:raw}"} | country != "" | keep country [30d]))))
sum by (country, longitude, latitude) (count_over_time({job="crowdsec", instance=~"${host:raw}"} | country != "" | keep country, longitude, latitude [30d]))
